parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-2 performance-lookup parity — lookup-function edge coverage + no-op buildAdaptiveState baseline. Three completed push-a bench-press sessions with FLAT performance (60x6, value 360 each) so buildAdaptiveState produces neither a drop nor an improvement and no pain — every output collection is empty. The probes pin the lookup functions across branches: findLastPerformance found vs absent (null); findPreviousPerformance with no skip (== findLast), skipping the latest (-> next match), and skipping an id that never appears in history (skipped never flips true -> null); findRecentPerformances at limits 1/2/5. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history via makeSession (push-a / bench-press), most-recent-first. lastUpdated substituted with the deterministic clock date.
